_x0030_.VALUE: 請輸入您的帳號及Email. 系統會在10分鐘將密碼寄到您的Email中
產生RMA NO有誤. 請與系統管理者連絡
ID號碼有問題. 請與系統管理者連絡
客戶ID重複. 請確認後重新輸入
客戶ID重複. 請確認後重新輸入
請輸入顯示的開始日期
你的CipherLab RMA系統使用者資訊

這封Mail回覆您下列的E-RMA帳號資訊. 公司名稱: [$Company Name$] 登入ID: [$Account ID$] 登入密碼: [$Password]
 請連結 http://e-rma.cipherlab.com.tw 並輸入上述提到之您的帳號密碼. 建議您在登入後馬上修改密碼以確認使用上的安全.
 謝謝您使用E-RMA系統 == 此Mail為自動發送. 請勿回覆 ==
 如果任何使用上的問題. 請連絡E-RMA 系統管理者: [$Email URL$]

 Best Regards,
 Cipherlab E-RMA
[$Customer's Name$] 的RMA 送修項目已於 [$Quoted submit date$] 由[$Sales Name(Submit person)$] 報價且打上折扣.

您已經於E-RMA系統收到來自 [$Customer Name$] RMA需求. 此需求已經由 [$Sales Name$] 於 [$Sales Confirm Date$] 進行報價且打上折扣.
 如要查詢報價細節內容請連結 [$Supervisor login url$] 或 http://e-rma.cipherlab.com.tw 中於Status Query中進行查詢. 謝謝您使用E-RMA系統
 == 此Mail為自動發送. 請勿回覆 ==
 如果任何使用上的問題. 請連絡E-RMA 系統管理者: [$Email URL$]

 Best Regards,
 Cipherlab E-RMA
您的RMA需求單號: [$Request No$] 已成功於 [$Request Date$] 呈交給 CipherLab.

親愛的 [$Applicant Name$],
 E-RMA系統已於 [$Request Date$] 收到您的RMA需求並確認, 需求單號為 [$RMA No$].
 如要查詢維修狀態請連結 E-RMA網站: http://e-rma.cipherlab.com.tw , 並於Status Query中進行查詢. 


請列印您的 RMA 申請表，將RMA申請表與您的設備包裝在一起後寄送到 RMA 申請表上顯示的服務中心地址。


謝謝您使用E-RMA系統.
 == 此Mail為自動發送. 請勿回覆 ==
 如果任何使用上的問題. 請連絡E-RMA 系統管理者: [$Email URL$]


Best Regards,
 Cipherlab E-RMA
[$Customer's Name$] 需求單: [$Request No$] 已於[$Request Date$]送交到CipherLab.

親愛的 [$Sales Name$] / [$Assistant Name$],
 E-RMA系統已於 [$Request Date$] 收到 [$Customer Name$] 的RMA需求並確認, 需求單號為 [$RMA No$].


如要查詢細節內容請連結 E-RMA網站: http://e-rma.cipherlab.com.tw 並於Status Query中進行查詢. 


請列印您的 RMA 申請表，將RMA申請表與您的設備包裝在一起後寄送到 RMA 申請表上顯示的服務中心地址。


謝謝您使用E-RMA系統.

 提醒您的RMA單: [$RMA No$] 報價已等候您的確認超過 [$overdue days$]. 請儘快審核以免耽誤您的維修時程.

[$Customer User Name$]-RMA No:[$RMA No$] has been Repaired by repair center.

Dear [$Name$],
 Your RMA:[$RMA No$] Have been Repaired.
 [$item$]
 [$Note$]


To check the application status, or to see detailed application information,
 please visit our RMA website: http://e-rma.cipherlab.com.tw and select "status query" link.


Thank you for using the RMA system.



== This is an automated system notification, please do not reply. ==
 == For any system operation issues, please contact Cipherlab E-RMA Administrator:[$Email URL$] ==


Best Regards,
 Cipherlab E-RMA Service Center
[$Customer's Name$] Your RMA No: [$RMA No$] has been Canceled.

Dear [$Repair User Name$], RMA:[$RMA No$] \n Have been Canceled. To check the application status, or to see detailed application information, please visit our RMA website: http://e-rma.cipherlab.com.tw and select "status query" link. Thank you for using the RMA system. == This is an automated system notification, please do not reply. == For any system operation issues, please contact CipherLab RMA Administrator: [$Email URL$] Best Regards, CipherLab RMA Service Center
您的RMA料件需求單號: [$Request No$] 已成功於 [$Request Date$] 呈交給 CipherLab.
密碼已傳送到你註冊的Email. 請檢查您的信箱.
找不到該帳號或Email. 請與CipherLab連絡.
&lt請以HTML格式編輯於下方空白格中&gt
儲存資料中. 請稍候
載入資料中. 請稍候
處理資料中. 請稍候
匯出資料中. 請稍候
處理資料中. 請稍候
密碼已修改成功. 請使用此密碼登入
載入資料中. 請稍候
請輸入送修品的序號及型號
請於下方清單選擇型號
以下列查詢條件查詢送修項目狀態
台灣維修中心 – 台北
等待處理項目 – 出貨
以下列條件搜尋出通單項目
等待處理項目 – 出通單
請挑選下列料件後關閉視窗
填寫未完成! 請進入各維修項目的”內容”填寫再確認
此項目正由其它使用者編輯中
這個項目已經收取. 此張RMA單無法修改
Some goods Warranty in one month.
請輸入人力工時（每人時）
不良原因分析報表-依型號
Please fill in the header below and click button Go, system will list the price table.
Please pick one product group from below lists and get window closed.
Please pick part no from below lists and get window closed.
Import patch of serial No. and output warranty information to below:
Serial Number Can Not Empty,Please Check Detail List!
System Not Permit Serial Number Duplicate,Please Check Detail List!
This Serial Number Not Valid,Please Input Another!
This Serial Number Not Permit To Modify!
此序列號已超出保固期，麻煩請與您的銷售人員聯繫
此序列號已過全保保修期限，麻煩請與您的銷售人員聯繫
RMA No: [$RMA No$] has SN:[$Serial No$] need to input spec or price

Dear [$HQRMA_Name$],
 Please input the following spec or price information of the part to complete the Quotaing Process...
 RMA no:[$RMA No$]
 Serial no:[$Serial No$]
 Model no:[$Model No$]
 Reason:(Lack of spec or Lack of price)


 To check the application status, or to see detailed application information,
 please visit our RMA website: http://e-rma.cipherlab.com.tw and select "status query" link.
 Thank you for using the RMA system.


 == This is an automated system notification, please do not reply. ==
 == For any system operation issues, please contact CipherLab RMA Administrator:e-rma@cipherlab.com.tw ==

 Best Regards,
 CipherLab RMA Service Center
System abnormal from Input data, Please directly click the “Close” button, The system will automatically save the records and contact administrator
RMA No: [$RMA No$] has quoted. Please confirm.

Dear [$Customer User Name$],
 This notice is your RMA request items have been quoted. Please confirm this quotation soon. If you get any question, please contact CipherLab sales [$Sales Name$] / [$Assistant Name$]. Thank you!
 You have received a RMA [$Customer Name$] application with request number: [$RMA Request No$] on RMA System, To see the detailed quotation and confirm for repairing , http://e-rma.cipherlab.com.tw on waiting for processing page.
 Thank you for using the RMA system.


 == This is an automated system notification, please do not reply ==
 == For any system operation issues, please contact CipherLab RMA Administrator: [$Email URL$] ==

 Best Regards,
 CipherLab RMA Service Center

Dear [$Repaire Name$],
 This notice is your RMA request items have been quoted. Please confirm this quotation soon.
 If you get any question, please contact CipherLab sales [$Sales Name$] / [$Assistant Name$]. Thank you!
 You have received a RMA [$Customer Name$] application with request number: [$RMA Request No$] on RMA System,
 To see the detailed quotation and confirm for repairing, http://e-rma.cipherlab.com.tw on waiting for processing page. 


 Thank you for using the RMA system.
 == This is an automated system notification, please do not reply ==
 == For any system operation issues, please contact CipherLab RMA Administrator: [$Email URL$] ==

 Best Regards,

Please download Inovice Report 及 AD Report.
[$Customer's Name$]-[RMA System notice] RMA No:[$RMANo$],A/R NO:[$ARNo$],INVOICE No:[$INVNo$]

Dear Customer,

 This is to Notice that RMA has generated two reports:
 Account Receivable NO: [$Receivable NO$]
 Invoice NO : [$Invoice NO$]
 Please see the files attached….
 Thank you for using the RMA system.


 == This is an automated system notification, please do not reply ==
 == For any system operation issues, please contact CipherLab RMA Administrator: e-rma@cipherlab.com.tw ==

 Best Regards,
 CipherLab RMA Service Center
Part Price is abnormal, Please Check!
discount金額不可大於原始金額
重要訊息：若送修品項已購買綜合保固，CipherLab維修中心將會派人前往取件。其他沒有綜合保固的品項請不要放在同一個包裹送件，否則將依規定收取快遞費用。
綜合保固授權維修，RMA No.[$Request No$] .

致CipherLab維修中心，

 [$Customer Name$] 公司已於 [$Request Date$] 提出維修需求，RMA號碼 [$RMA No$] .

 請與該客戶聯繫，並派遣快遞取件。

 送修期間，客戶隨時可以在CipherLab RMA 系統( http://e-rma.cipherlab.com.tw )查詢進度。

 Best Regards,
 CipherLab RMA Service Center
RMA Number for Parts Request Only
顧客公司名稱不可以為空值
顧客電話不可以為空值
顧客連絡人不可以為空值
顧客電子信箱不可以為空值
顧客公司地址不可以為空值
保固有效期请参阅保修细则
